emailMagicLinkFallbackIntro: If the button doesn’t work, copy this link into your browser:
emailMagicLinkIntro: You’re almost there. Click on the button below to securely sign in to bexio.
emailMagicLinkNoteBrowser: Use the same browser tab in which you started the sign-in process.
emailMagicLinkNoteOnce: The link can only be used once.
emailMagicLinkNoteTime: For security reasons, this link will only be valid for {0} minutes.
emailMagicLinkSecurityNotice: Then you can ignore this email. In that case, to keep your account secure, we recommend that you change your password. Never share this link with anyone.
magicLinkErrorExpiredOrUsedBody: It may have expired, already been used, or been replaced by a newer one. Start a new sign-in from your application to receive a new link.
magicLinkErrorExpiredOrUsedTitle: This sign-in link is no longer valid
magicLinkErrorWrongBrowserBody: For your security, sign-in links only work in the browser where the sign-in was started. Open the link in that browser to continue, or start a new sign-in from your application.
magicLinkErrorWrongBrowserTitle: Open this link in your original browser
magicLinkExpired: Your sign-in link has expired or was already used. Start again.
magicLinkInvalid: This sign-in link is no longer valid. Start again.
magicLinkTooManyAttempts: Too many invalid attempts. Start again.
magicLinkWaitingBody: Open the email we just sent to {0} and click the link to continue.
magicLinkWaitingHint: The link is valid for {0} minutes.
